title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to download and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Code Llama, etc. on macOS, Linux and Windows with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; docker run -d -p 3000:8080 ollama-webui/ollama-webui.

title: ollama4j
summary: Community Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; Maven Central artifact ollama4j.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that swaps GitHub Copilot backend for a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Lightweight CLI chat client for Ollama written in Node; install via npm i -g ollama-chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All-chat UI with backend switcher for Ollama, featuring local model management.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit template repo for building chat or completion apps backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger (CUE) module that spins up an Ollama service with chosen models inside CI pipelines.

title: ollama-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang shard wrapping the Ollama REST API; shard install ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python repo showing how to build a RAG chain with Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-github-actions
summary: GitHub Action to install Ollama and pull models in CI/CD workflows.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: Community C# .NET SDK for Ollama; NuGet package OllamaSharp.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app that starts/stops Ollama server and shows model status.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar using Ollama models.
